## 环境信息 | Environment
- 操作系统 | OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python 版本 | Python Version: [e.g., 3.10.5]
- Agent 框架 | Agent Framework: [e.g., Claude Code 1.0.0, OpenClaw 2.0.0]
- Tapestry 版本 | Tapestry Version: [e.g., commit hash or tag]
